report.summary: Active cycle: 15 pages published today (batches 1-5), all with page.tsx and metadata. 562 total published, 2 remaining in queue. TS errors stable at 142 (non-blocking). No new commits or deploys since 21aaf5b. 225 uncommitted files (up from 215).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 562 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 560 last cycle — 2 pages promoted from queue)
All 15 pages published today (2026-03-27 batches 1-5) have page.tsx files — zero missing for today's batch
457/562 published slugs have matching page.tsx files; 105 missing (legacy backlog, unchanged)
Metadata verified on sample pages: loan-calculator (missing explicit metadata export), virtuals-protocol, desci-guide, exchanges/best/bitcoin — all have title + description
142 TypeScript errors across 5 files — unchanged: lido-v3-stvaults (94 errors), structured-data.examples.ts (40), crypto-arbitrage (4), institutional-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2)
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do not block Vercel deploys
No new regressions introduced this cycle
Live site HTTP verification blocked by egress proxy

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6 public API route files present: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Note: CoinGecko and DefiLlama do not have dedicated route files — data is fetched inline within the prices and defi-yields routes respectively
Cache TTLs verified and healthy: prices (60s), trending (300s/swr600), fear-greed (600s/swr1200), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/swr600), defi-yields (300s/swr600)
defi-yields has strongest resilience pattern: circuit breaker (5-fail threshold, 1min reset), retries with exponential backoff, 5s timeout
Health endpoint (/api/health) present with rate limiting (100 req/min), checks coingecko-api, analytics, and cache services
ONGOING: 0/6 public API routes integrate the rate-limiter module — only /api/health uses it
No code changes to API routes this cycle — all stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
No new commits since last cycle — production still running 21aaf5b
225 uncommitted files (up from 215 last cycle): growth from new pages, reports, and OG images
next.config.ts: ignoreBuildErrors=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, image cache TTL=86400s
Security headers active: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy
No error spikes detected — TS error count stable at 142
ACTION NEEDED: 225 uncommitted files should be committed and deployed to push today's 15 new pages live

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 15 pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES across 5 batches (crypto-loans calculators, exchange guides, 10 learn articles)
PUBLISH_QUEUE nearly empty: only 2 pages remaining (crypto-wallet-security-token-approvals, restaking-comparison)
Both queued pages are missing page.tsx — need to be built before publishing
CARRY-OVER: 105 published slugs still lack page.tsx files (legacy debt, not growing)
CARRY-OVER: Rate limiter module unused by public API routes
BLOCKER: No commit/deploy cycle has run — 225 uncommitted files including today's 15 new pages are NOT live yet
RECOMMENDATION: Commit and deploy to push today's content live, then build the 2 remaining queue pages to clear the backlog
